name: 调节与协调
subject: biology
domain_name: A2 · 能量与稳态 / A2 · Energy & Homeostasis / A2 · Energy & Homeostasis
curriculum_points:
1 describe the structure of a chromosome, limited to:
• DNA
• histone proteins
• sister chromatids
• centromere
• telomeres
4 outline the role of telomeres in preventing the loss of genes from the ends of chromosomes during DNA replication

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 生物过程动画：细胞/分子/生态系统等可视化模拟
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 生物过程可视化模拟

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「调节与协调」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：1 describe the structure of a chromosome, limited to:
• DNA
• histone proteins
• sister chromatids
• centromere
• telome…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：4 outline the role of telomeres in preventing the loss of genes from the ends of… 对理解「调节与协调」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
